commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6abde6433d665f15dc9d2a75420513bfb1fd50b4)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes Telegram inbound debounce so rapid non-forward media messages enter the debounce buffer and coalesce into one agent turn.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main debounces forwarded media but default-lane media still bypasses inbound debounce. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction, so the remaining proof gap is real transport behavior.
commands.review_followup: The next step is contributor or maintainer rebase/port plus real Telegram proof; ClawSweeper repair automation cannot supply the external setup proof for this external PR.

target.title: fix(telegram): debounce media messages to coalesce rapid sends into one agent turn
target.author: moeedahmed

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
